The application deadline for the Collaborative Impact Partnership Programme is:

June 8, 2026

Late applications will not be considered, and shortlisted candidates will be contacted after review.

Click here for more and to apply

Conclusion

The Sustainable Future Collaborative Impact Partnership represents a rare opportunity for mission-driven organisations to receive not only financial support but also hands-on strategic partnership designed to strengthen real-world impact.

By combining funding with active collaboration, the programme aims to help organisations deliver stronger outcomes in education, climate action, water access, biodiversity protection, and broader sustainability efforts across the Global South.

Click here for more global grant opportunities

The post Sustainable Future Foundation: CHF 50,000 Collaborative Impact Partnership Grant 2026 appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.

item.title: Legal Fellowship 2026 for BRAC Social Empowerment and Legal Protection Programme: Apply Now for 20 Fellowship Positions
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Are you a young legal professional looking to gain practical experience in legal aid, Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR), and case management? The BRAC Social Empowerment and Legal Protection (SELP) Programme has officially opened applications for the Legal Fellowship 2026. This 12-month fellowship offers an excellent opportunity for aspiring lawyers to work closely with experienced legal […]

The post Legal Fellowship 2026 for BRAC Social Empowerment and Legal Protection Programme: Apply Now for 20 Fellowship Positions appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.
item.content:encoded:
Are you a young legal professional looking to gain practical experience in legal aid, Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR), and case management? The BRAC Social Empowerment and Legal Protection (SELP) Programme has officially opened applications for the Legal Fellowship 2026.

This 12-month fellowship offers an excellent opportunity for aspiring lawyers to work closely with experienced legal practitioners, contribute to access to justice initiatives, and strengthen their practical legal skills while supporting vulnerable communities across Bangladesh.

About the BRAC SELP Legal Fellowship 2026

The Legal Fellowship 2026 is designed to provide first-hand field experience for young advocates interested in legal empowerment, legal aid systems, and dispute resolution mechanisms.

Selected fellows will work directly with BRAC’s panel lawyers and legal teams to support case management processes and promote justice at the grassroots level.

Fellowship Details

  • Position: Legal Fellowship
  • Programme: BRAC Social Empowerment and Legal Protection (SELP)
  • Duration: 12 months
  • Location: Outside Dhaka, Bangladesh
  • Number of Positions: 20
  • Application Deadline: 8 June 2026

Scope of Work

Successful fellows will:

  • Work under a 12-month contractual engagement at BRAC field offices
  • Gain practical exposure to Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR)
  • Learn about Bangladesh’s legal aid systems and case management processes
  • Collaborate with BRAC panel lawyers and legal professionals
  • Receive supervision and detailed Terms of Reference (TOR) from the SELP programme
  • Obtain an official completion certificate from the SELP programme upon successful completion of the fellowship

This fellowship is ideal for young lawyers seeking hands-on legal experience in community justice and social empowerment initiatives.

Eligibility Criteria

Applicants must meet the following requirements:

Educational Qualification

  • Bachelor of Laws (LL.B) degree from a reputed university

Professional Requirements

  • Affiliation with a BAR Association as an advocate
  • Minimum one year of legal practice in an affiliated BAR is preferred but not mandatory

Required Application Documents

Interested candidates must submit:

  • A complete CV highlighting educational background and relevant legal experience
  • Contact details of two referees
  • Copies of all academic certificates
  • Copies of professional certificates

Interested applicants are encouraged to prepare and submit their application documents before the deadline.

Why You Should Apply

The BRAC SELP Legal Fellowship 2026 provides a valuable platform for early-career legal professionals to:

  • Build practical legal skills
  • Gain experience in legal aid and ADR systems
  • Work on real case management processes
  • Expand professional networks in the legal sector
  • Contribute to justice and social empowerment initiatives in Bangladesh

For aspiring advocates passionate about legal empowerment and community justice, this fellowship can serve as an important stepping stone in building a meaningful legal career.

About BRAC

BRAC is one of the world’s largest international development organizations, working across multiple sectors including education, healthcare, livelihoods, gender justice, and legal empowerment. Through its Social Empowerment and Legal Protection (SELP) Programme, BRAC supports access to justice and legal protection for vulnerable populations across Bangladesh.

Application Deadline

📅 Last Date to Submit Application: 8 June 2026

Interested applicants are encouraged to prepare and submit their application documents before the deadline.

The post Legal Fellowship 2026 for BRAC Social Empowerment and Legal Protection Programme: Apply Now for 20 Fellowship Positions appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.
